skills: High Level of Analytical and Cognitive Skills

education.institution: Massachusetts College of Pharmacy and Health Science
University of Information Technology, Mechanics and Optics

experience.title: Staff Pharmacist
experience.description: Manage ancillary staff in fulfilling more than 1,500 prescriptions weekly. Consult with physicians and patients with regard to medication dosage, drug interactions, medical equipment, disease management and potential side effects of prescription and OTC medications.

experience.title: Electronics Technician
experience.description: Worked closely with team of engineers and technician. Maintained and troubleshoot electronic and computer based equipment.

experience.title: Teaching Assistant/ Laboratory Supervisor
experience.description: Supervised and helped students during laboratory experiments. Soldered and assembled laboratory equipment.

extra_fields.certifications: In good standing with the Massachusetts Board of Pharmacy
